atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the @tailwind directive to include Tailwind's base styles, component styles, and utility styles.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use the @apply directive to apply Tailwind utility classes within custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Use the @layer directive to group Tailwind styles into layers (base, components, utilities).

atDirectives.name: @responsive
atDirectives.description: Use the @responsive directive to generate responsive variants of custom styles.

atDirectives.name: @variants
atDirectives.description: Use the @variants directive to generate state variants of custom styles.
